scripts.build: pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-core build && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-react build && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-example-basic build
scripts.pack:packages: mkdir -p dist-pack && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-core pack --pack-destination dist-pack && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-react pack --pack-destination dist-pack
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-core publish --access public && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-react publish --access public
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-core build && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-react build && pnpm --filter @emgapps/orb-example-basic typecheck
